Living Incunabula Plate Mail

Once in a while, the unit removes all movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, and fear, becomes immune to them for 5 sec and goes into a frenzy. They increase in size, and all their stats are increased by 20% for 5 sec. Also during this time, when attacking, the armor wearer reduces stats of a random enemy by 20% for 5 sec and deals 200000 pure damage. Stacks up to 3 times. The armor wearer restores health equal to 80% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
